nasb.text: But the word of the Lord endures forever.” And this is the word which was preached to you.

esv.text: but the word of the Lord remains forever.” And this word is the good news that was preached to you.

cnv.text: 唯有主的道，永遠長存。” 所傳給你們的福音就是這道。

ccb.text: 唯有主道永长存。” 这道就是传给你们的福音。

csbs.text: 但主的话却永远长存。” 所传给你们的福音就是这话。
